treatment_timeline.event: Patient admitted for work-up of progressive dyspnea.
Cardiac catheterization performed, revealing less severe aortic stenosis than previously thought.
Severe pulmonary hypertension diagnosed, related to interstitial lung disease.
New medications (sildenafil and morphine) started to help with shortness of breath.
Patient discharged home with hospice care.

patient_outcome.final_status: Patient discharged home with hospice care due to progressive and irreversible decline.
patient_outcome.long_term_prognosis: Severe pulmonary fibrosis and pulmonary hypertension expected to cause ongoing symptoms.
